Register

::: {.nav-cover}
:::

::: {.site-wrapper}
::: {.container}
[![Zotero](data:image/svg+xml;base64,){width="108" height="32"}](https://www.zotero.org/){.brand}

-   [Groups](https://www.zotero.org/groups/){.nav-link}

:::

::: {.register role="main"}
::: {.section .section .section-md}
::: {.container-fluid .container-fluid-col-10}
::: {.row .justify-content-center .mb-5}
[Log in](https://www.zotero.org/user/login){.nav-link} [Forgot your password?](https://www.zotero.org/user/lostpassword){.nav-link}
:::

::: {.row .justify-content-center .mb-5}
Register {#register .text-align-center}
========

::: {.register}
::: {#react-registerForm}
::: {.section .section .section-md .register-section}
::: {.container-fluid .container-fluid-col-10}
If you haven't already created a Zotero account, please take a few moments to register now. It's a **free** way to [sync and access your library from anywhere](https://www.zotero.org/support/sync), and it lets you join [groups](https://www.zotero.org/support/groups) and [back up all your attached files](https://www.zotero.org/support/sync#file_syncing).

::: {.collapse .sf-hidden}
:::

::: {.notifier .success role="alert"}
Thanks for registering. We've sent an email to activate your account.
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.credits}
Zotero is a project of [Digital Scholar](http://digitalscholar.org/), a nonprofit organization dedicated to the development of software and services for researchers and cultural heritage institutions, and is developed by a [global community](https://www.zotero.org/support/credits_and_acknowledgments).
:::
